Where land
meets light

Irish Artist & Painter

Janet Cruise Halpin captures the living atmosphere of the Irish landscape: its forests, shores, and luminous skies, through layered oils that breathe with colour and texture.

Shop Prints View Originals

Giclée fine-art editions · Ships worldwide

Explore

The Artist

Grounded in the wild

Janet Cruise Halpin is a renowned Irish artist living and working in Laragh, Co. Wicklow, in the heart of the Wicklow Mountains. Her studio overlooks the ancient oak woodland of Glendalough, and that deep sense of place infuses every canvas.

Working primarily in oil on canvas, Janet builds rich surface layers: ochre light through a forest canopy, the hush of morning mist over a lake, the muscular weight of stone. Her paintings have been exhibited widely across Ireland and are held in private collections internationally.

30+ Years Painting
4 Series
Co. Wicklow Ireland

Original Paintings

Works on Canvas

Each original painting is a unique, one-of-a-kind work in oil on canvas. Prices vary by scale and are available on inquiry. Janet responds personally to all requests.

Studio Journal

The voice
behind the canvas

"I am drawn to the moment when light falls through leaves, not the leaves themselves, but what happens between them. The Wicklow forests hold a particular quality of green that I never tire of."

Janet Cruise Halpin · Laragh Studio

An artist shaped by residency & exhibition

2018

Tyrone Guthrie Centre

Artist Residency

Ongoing

Co. Wicklow Studio

Laragh, Ireland

The Shop

Fine Art Prints

Giclée fine-art prints on 250gsm acid-free archival matte paper, uncoated, natural white and FSC-certified. Produced to order.

The Collector's Circle

First access to
new works

Janet releases new paintings and limited editions to her private list before they are shown publicly. Collectors receive studio updates, early viewing invitations, and occasional notes from Janet about works in progress.

  • Preview new series before public release
  • Personal studio notes from Janet on each new work
  • First right of purchase on limited originals
  • Invitations to private studio viewings in Co. Wicklow
Welcome to the circle. Janet will be in touch.

No spam, ever. One or two emails a year. Unsubscribe any time.

Currently in the studio

Hover to glimpse

Members see new work first

Get in Touch

Commission a Painting

Janet welcomes commissions and personal inquiries about original works. Whether you are an interior designer sourcing statement pieces or a collector seeking something bespoke, reach out directly for a conversation.
